◎译　　名　青年男子的画像
◎片　　名　Portrait of a Young Man
◎年　　代　1931
◎产　　地　美国

◎简　　介  

　　A collection of various things that appealed to director Henwar Rodakiewciz at the time for its visual expression of his inner thoughts and feelings. Its subject matter ranges from cigarette smoke to machinery, leaves, clouds, and water. The result: a monumental study of natural and abstract motions devoid of people.
introduction: A collection of various things that appealed to director Henwar Rodakiewciz at the time for its visual expression of his inner thoughts and feelings. Its subject matter ranges from cigarette smoke to machinery, leaves, clouds, and water. The result: a monumental study of natural and abstract motions devoid of people.
